name_cn:
Genuine quality
New arrival AA
CE Early Spring MiniSoft16, chubby little cute crossbody bag
Following the mini size of the 16, the soft 16 also followed suit with a super cute crossbody mini soft. The texture is simply amazing, soft leather, can be worn over the shoulder or crossbody, guys can also carry it, adjustable strap design, lightweight!!
Style: Versatile item
Capacity: Should be top-tier among mini bags, very spacious
Style No.: 100352 Tan Brown
Dimensions: 18-12.5-6
